sampling_strategy: Stratified by series_class (min 2 per class, remainder proportional), seed=42
instructions: Fill the true_role column with the correct modality class for each series. Use one of the valid_class_labels listed above. Use the series_description, protocol_name, image_type, TR/TE, and scan_folder columns to make your determination. If unsure, add a note in the notes column. When done, save as phase4_labeling_manifest_filled.csv and run: python phase4_compare_labels.py --manifest outputs_phase4/phase4_labeling_manifest_filled.csv --out outputs_phase4
